Why Upstate NY Chooses Sasquatch

Licensed & Insured

Professional-grade service with accountability on every job.

Eco-Friendly Options

Effective treatments designed to be tough on pests, not your space.

24-Hour Response

Rapid scheduling for urgent infestations and repeat problems.

Locally Owned & Operated

We know the pests, seasons, and properties that define Upstate New York.

Satisfaction Guaranteed

Clear communication, dependable follow-through, and results that last.

Services Built for Real-World Pest Pressure

From one-time removal to ongoing prevention, our team handles the most stubborn pest issues with a heavy-duty approach.

View All Services
🐜

Ant Control

Stop carpenter ants, pavement ants, and kitchen invaders before they turn into a bigger problem.

🐭

Rodent Control

Seal, trap, and prevent mice and rats from getting comfortable in walls, attics, and garages.

🛏️

Bed Bugs

Targeted treatment plans for fast-moving infestations that demand a thorough, disciplined response.

🦟

Mosquito Control

Reduce bites and reclaim your yard with seasonal treatments that help knock down breeding hotspots.

🪵

Termite Treatment

Protect wooden structures with inspection-backed treatment strategies and prevention planning.

🦝

Wildlife Removal

Responsible removal solutions for raccoons, squirrels, skunks, and other unwanted visitors.

What Customers Are Saying

★★★★★

“We had mice in our Saratoga home and Sasquatch came out the next day. They explained everything clearly, sealed the entry points, and the problem was gone.”

— Melissa R., Saratoga Springs

★★★★★

“Our backyard in Albany was unusable because of mosquitoes. Their seasonal treatment made a huge difference and the crew was professional from start to finish.”

— James T., Albany

★★★★★

“We found bed bugs in our Utica rental. Sasquatch moved fast, treated the property, and gave us a plan to prevent a repeat. Excellent service.”

— Denise K., Utica

Common Upstate NY Pests We Handle

Seasonal weather, wooded properties, older homes, and damp basements create the perfect setup for recurring pest problems across Upstate New York.
